Document:
# Survival basics
The wasteland can be very harsh in our survival roleplay, where a wrong turn or action can lead to your death very quickly. Here are some basic tips to help you stay alive.
To survive long term, you will need [color=green]food[/color] and [color=green]water[/color]. The day-night cycle lasts a total of 1 hour, and during that time you need to eat and drink at least once, otherwise you will die.
## Water
In the wasteland, clean water is a precious commodity. You will find many water sources, but be careful - many of them are contaminated with radiation or other dangerous substances. Do not drink water straight from the source. Purify it with filters or by boiling to avoid illness and radiation sickness.
## Food
Hunger is your constant companion in the wasteland. You will need to search for food constantly. You can gather wild plants, hunt animals, or grow your own crops. But stay alert: some plants and animals may be poisonous or mutated. Cook food over a campfire or stove to kill bacteria and parasites.
## Radiation
Radiation is an invisible killer that permeates the wasteland. Avoid high-radiation zones, wear protective clothing, and use anti-rad to reduce exposure. Radiation can cause illness, mutations, and even death.
## Weather
Weather in the wasteland is unpredictable and dangerous. Sandstorms, acid rain, and sharp temperature swings can be a serious challenge for any survivor. Watch the forecast and keep appropriate gear on hand: protective masks, coats, and warm clothing.
